title: agropyron repens var. maritimum
intro: Agropyron repens var. maritimum, also known as coastal couch grass, is a variant of the perennial grass Agropyron repens. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of coastal couch grass include its ability to treat various ailments such as wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Coastal couch grass is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in salves and ointments to apply topically to affected areas.
